title: thymus × hieronymi nothosubsp. hieronymi
intro: Thymus × hieronymi nothosubsp. hieronymi, also known as Hieronymus thyme or Spanish thyme, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Thymus zygis and Thymus mastichina. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thymus × hieronymi nothosubsp. hieronymi include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
